hero_subtitle: SFTY Business streamlines sanctions screening by transforming matches into structured cases with audit-ready evidence and risk-based routing for efficient regulatory review.

problem_title: Sanctions cases depend on manual creation
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and errors when sanctions matches and screening alerts require manual case setup. This slows review workflows, weakens audit trails and creates gaps between alert detection and compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY automates the creation and routing of sanctions alerts into structured cases, linking provider outputs, risk rules and reviewer actions to maintain clear audit trails and accelerate compliance workflows.
workflow_title: From sanctions hits to compliance cases
workflow_description: SFTY connects sanctions screening alerts through risk-based routing, case creation, review, decision logging and evidence preservation for structured compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated alerts. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented sanctions screening outputs into structured cases, routing, decisions and audit-ready evidence that improve operational control and reduce manual compliance effort.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that governs provider outputs, preserves audit evidence, enables bank due diligence and supports enterprise-ready deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how sanctions alerts become review cases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps compliance teams turn provider alerts into structured workflows, applying internal rules, routing reviews, opening cases, recording decisions and preparing regulatory reports efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY create sanctions cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automatically routes sanctions screening alerts based on risk rules, creates cases for review, links evidence and supports escalation through configurable workflows tailored for digital asset compliance.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence in audit-ready formats, enabling traceability and review readiness for internal and external compliance assessments.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into connected compliance workflows without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above sanctions screening providers, integrating their outputs into structured case workflows without replacing the underlying screening tools.
final_title: Structure sanctions case workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY turns sanctions matches into controlled cases with risk-based routing, decision logs and audit-ready evidence.
